execution: Direct via Shopify Admin MCP (graphql_mutation pageUpdate). Batch 2 of the CMS pages improvement pass — 4 stale or thin pages identified from the full /pages/* inventory and rewritten with structured content, comparison tables, and FAQ sections.
scope: Second pass of CMS page improvements. Candidates identified by sorting the published-pages list by updatedAt + body length — picked 4 high-traffic targets that had stale Word-export content (warranty 2023), legacy 2018 boilerplate (mattress-recycling-fee), broken Hydrogen-theme markup (mattress-store-contact), or essentially empty bodies (mattress-firm-vs-la-mattress-store).

additions: 'Manufacturer warranty vs comfort exchange' comparison table (6 rows clarifying what each policy covers)
'Common warranty terms by brand' table (8 brands × 4 columns: term, sag threshold, frame requirement, term length)
'What warranties don\'t cover' bullet list (7 exclusions including stains, unsupported foundations, removed law tags)
5-step 'How to file a warranty claim' ordered list
6-bullet 'How to keep your warranty valid' tips section
8 FAQ Q&As inline (plus the 6 already in lib/faq-extra.ts — but those weren't shipping due to the now-fixed key bug)
Cross-links to all 6 brand-specific warranty pages
removed: External link to consumer.ftc.gov (outbound link to competitor info)
Generic 6-step claim process (replaced with specific 5-step LA Mattress process)
pages_body_updated.bug_fixed: lib/faq-extra.ts entry was keyed 'mattress-warranty' but the canonical page handle is 'warranty' — FAQPage JSON-LD was never shipping on /pages/warranty. Rekeyed to 'warranty' in the companion commit.

additions: 'Why the fee exists' explainer (3-bullet rationale: landfill, illegal dumping, recyclable material)
'What the fee covers' per-item table (7 rows: which items carry the fee, which don't)
'What happens to the recycled mattress' material breakdown (steel/foam/fabric/wood with % weights)
4-step 'How LA Mattress handles your old mattress' ordered list
7 FAQ Q&As inline (also surfaces as FAQPage JSON-LD via lib/faq-extra.ts)
Internal links to /pages/mattress-store-delivery and /pages/mattress-store-locations
External link to mattressrecyclingcouncil.org/mrc-in-your-state/california (canonical state info)
removed: <noindex>...</noindex> wrapper (deprecated, ignored by Google but a confusing signal)

Outdated $10.50 fee figure (now references 'per-piece, set by the state, itemized at checkout' instead — fee amount may have changed since 2018, and a stale fixed number is worse than an authoritative pointer)

Bold-prefixed Q&A format (replaced with proper

Q?

A

for FAQPage extraction)

additions: 'Fastest way to reach us' contact-method comparison table (4 methods × response time × best-for)
All 5 showroom phone numbers + addresses inline (was missing — visitors had to click through to find them)
'What we handle by phone / email' 7-bullet list covering product questions, delivery, warranties, exchanges, financing, price matching
'Need an in-person consult?' section with 30-min fitting booking callout
'Looking for the corporate side?' section for business / press / careers inquiries
6 FAQ Q&As inline (also surfaces as FAQPage JSON-LD via lib/faq-extra.ts)
removed: <div class="contacts"><div class="item phone">... Hydrogen-theme markup (CSS classes don't exist in this storefront — rendered as completely unstyled markup)
Image references to /cdn/shopify/.../phone_thumb.png and similar (broken thumbnails from the old theme)

<script>// <![CDATA[ $(function(){$(".chat").click(function(){$zopim.livechat.window.show()})}); // ]]></script> — broken jQuery/Zopim call, no jQuery loaded, no Zopim widget; would error in browser console
Stale lamattressplus@gmail.com email (replaced with orders.lamattress@gmail.com — current canonical)

additions: 12-row side-by-side comparison table (ownership, locations, sales team, delivery, haul-away, comfort exchange, trial minimum, financing, price matching, brand selection, in-store stock)
'What's actually different in practice' section with 6 sub-sections (sales experience, delivery, price, comfort exchange, brands available, post-sale support)
'When Mattress Firm is the better choice' 4-bullet list (intellectually honest framing — not all customers should pick LA Mattress)
'When LA Mattress is the better choice' 4-bullet list
7 FAQ Q&As inline (also surfaces as FAQPage JSON-LD via lib/faq-extra.ts)
Multiple internal links to /collections/{brand} pages, /pages/love-your-bed-guarantee, /pages/mattress-store-financing, /pages/mattress-store-delivery, /pages/lowest-price-guarantee
removed: The entire previous body was a single sentence: 'Compare LA Mattress Store with Mattress Firm to find the best deals, delivery options, and customer service.' (105 bytes total). Replaced with 12KB of substantive comparison content.
pages_body_updated.seo_context: Branded competitor query — 'mattress firm vs', 'mattress firm vs LA mattress', 'difference between mattress firm and...' — typically have lower competition than the bare brand query and convert well when the page actually answers the comparison rather than just claiming to.

companion_code_changes.changes: Rekeyed 'mattress-warranty' → 'warranty' (FAQ key bug fix — entry existed but didn't ship because handle mismatch). Added new CMS_PAGE_FAQS entries for mattress-recycling-fee (7 Q&As), mattress-store-contact (6 Q&As), mattress-firm-vs-la-mattress-store (7 Q&As). Updated file-header docstring to reflect full coverage map.

verification: Subagent ran sequential pageUpdate + verification query on each page. All 4 confirmed: userErrors empty, updatedAt freshly advanced, body length within ±150 bytes of source (Shopify HTML formatter adds newlines inside table/list cells), no PLACEHOLDER strings anywhere. Spot-checked mattress-firm-vs-la-mattress-store body inline — comparison table renders, FAQ section intact, internal links present.
expected_seo_impact: FAQPage JSON-LD now ships on /pages/warranty (was broken due to key mismatch — 6 existing Q&As never reached Google), /pages/mattress-recycling-fee, /pages/mattress-store-contact, /pages/mattress-firm-vs-la-mattress-store

Branded competitor query /pages/mattress-firm-vs-la-mattress-store went from 1-sentence placeholder to 12KB of substantive comparison content — Rich Results eligible + ranks for 'mattress firm vs' query family
Stripped 1 broken jQuery/Zopim script that was throwing console errors on every /pages/mattress-store-contact page load
Cross-linked 6 brand-specific warranty pages from the new /pages/warranty content (PageRank flow into thin internal pages that previously had no inbound links)
followup: After deploy: Rich Results Test on all 4 pages to confirm FAQPage schema emission
After deploy: /pages/warranty visual QA — comparison tables render with banded rows (from .rte table CSS polish in PR #208)
Optional next pass: brand-specific warranty pages (6 of them, all 2023, Word-export cruft). Lower priority — those pages are brand-locked content with minimal customization room.
